'''royayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:huddled|huddled]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huddled|huddled]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| royayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:royayithi|royayithi]] || [[word:royayiji|royayiji]] || [[word:royayishi|royayishi]] || [[word:royayiki|royayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:royayuthuthu|royayuthuthu]] || [[word:royayujuju|royayujuju]] || [[word:royayushushu|royayushushu]] || [[word:royayukuku|royayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:royayuthu|royayuthu]] || [[word:royayuju|royayuju]] || [[word:royayushu|royayushu]] || [[word:royayuku|royayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:royayufthuf|royayufthuf]] || [[word:royayufjuf|royayufjuf]] || [[word:royayufshuf|royayufshuf]] || [[word:royayufkuf|royayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:royayethe|royayethe]] || [[word:royayeje|royayeje]] || [[word:royayeshe|royayeshe]] || [[word:royayeke|royayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:royayothotho|royayothotho]] || [[word:royayojojo|royayojojo]] || [[word:royayoshosho|royayoshosho]] || [[word:royayokoko|royayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:royayotho|royayotho]] || [[word:royayojo|royayojo]] || [[word:royayosho|royayosho]] || [[word:royayoko|royayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:royayofthof|royayofthof]] || [[word:royayofjof|royayofjof]] || [[word:royayofshof|royayofshof]] || [[word:royayofkof|royayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:royayÃŸfthÃŸf|royayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:royayÃŸfjÃŸf|royayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:royayÃŸfshÃŸf|royayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:royayÃŸfkÃŸf|royayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:royayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|royayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:royayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|royayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:royayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|royayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:royayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|royayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:royayÃŸfthÃŸf|royayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:royayÃŸfjÃŸf|royayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:royayÃŸfshÃŸf|royayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:royayÃŸfkÃŸf|royayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:royayÃŸfthÃŸf|royayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:royayÃŸfjÃŸf|royayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:royayÃŸfshÃŸf|royayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:royayÃŸfkÃŸf|royayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:royayÃḊthÃḊ|royayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:royayÃḊjÃḊ|royayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:royayÃḊshÃḊ|royayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:royayÃḊkÃḊ|royayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:royayathatha|royayathatha]] || [[word:royayajaja|royayajaja]] || [[word:royayashasha|royayashasha]] || [[word:royayakaka|royayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:royayatha|royayatha]] || [[word:royayaja|royayaja]] || [[word:royayasha|royayasha]] || [[word:royayaka|royayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:royayafthaf|royayafthaf]] || [[word:royayafjaf|royayafjaf]] || [[word:royayafshaf|royayafshaf]] || [[word:royayafkaf|royayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:royayasha|royayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:royayshÃḋsha|royayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:royayrosha|royayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:royaymusha|royaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:royayasha|royayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroyaynkshÃḋsha|goroyaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroyaynkrosha|goroyaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroyaynkmusha|goroyaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroyaynkyasha|goroyaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:royayayasha|royayayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:royayayshÃḋsha|royayayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:royayayrosha|royayayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:royayaymusha|royayaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:royayayasha|royayayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroyayaynkshÃḋsha|goroyayaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroyayaynkrosha|goroyayaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroyayaynkmusha|goroyayaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroyayaynkyasha|goroyayaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:reyÃḊyasha|reyÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:reyÃḊyshÃḋsha|reyÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:reyÃḊyrosha|reyÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:reyÃḊymusha|reyÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:reyÃḊyasha|reyÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goreyÃḊynkshÃḋsha|goreyÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goreyÃḊynkrosha|goreyÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goreyÃḊynkmusha|goreyÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goreyÃḊynkyasha|goreyÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:royfayasha|royfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:royfayshÃḋsha|royfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:royfayrosha|royfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:royfaymusha|royfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:royfayasha|royfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroyfaynkshÃḋsha|goroyfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroyfaynkrosha|goroyfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroyfaynkmusha|goroyfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroyfaynkyasha|goroyfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
